stemHtml: Where does a RESA begin, how is it oriented, and what is its minimum length?

options.a: It starts at the end of the runway strip, is symmetrical about the centreline, with a minimum length of 90 m.
options.b: It starts at the runway end, is symmetrical about the centreline, with a minimum length of 150 m.
options.c: It starts at the end of the runway strip, is symmetrical about the centreline, with a minimum length of 300 m.
options.d: It starts at the runway end, is symmetrical about the centreline, with a minimum length of 90 m.
